title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-Flex - UniFi Video Camera G5 Flex
description: The UniFi video camera G5 Flex offers, in addition to a futuristic design, 4MP resolution (2688 x 1512px at 30fps) thanks to a 5MP CMOS sensor, a wide-angle lens (approx. 2.8mm), viewing angle of 102.4 ° and audio microphone . Thanks to the versatile mounting, the camera can be installed on a wall, pipe or plate in both indoor and outdoor environments. An IR LED at a distance of up to 10m and an automatic IR cut filter provide an excellent image during the entire 24 hours even in poor lighting… The camera has one 10/100 Mbps LAN port with the option of powering via 802.3af PoE (36 to 57V DC) and a maximum consumption of 4W when IR is on. The camera meets IPX4 waterproofing and IK4 anti-vandal protection 4MP resolution at 30fps, 2688 x 1512 px H.264 video compression 102.4 ° wide viewing angle Protection against water IPX4, anti-vandal IK4 - for outdoor installation it is necessary to purchase UVC-G3-Flex-PWM-WT Built-in microphone Mounting on a board, wall and mast Managed by UniFi Protect software 2.2.7 or 2.7.28+ Camera (3) Holder (2) Tie-down tape Screws + dowels GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
